title: SimpleTPA
description: Adds simple teleportation commands like /tpa, /tpaccept, and /tpdeny to your Minecraft server. Perfect for multiplayer worlds.
body: # 🌐 SimpleTPA – Simple & Intuitive Teleportation Commands **SimpleTPA** is a lightweight and user-friendly mod that adds intuitive teleportation commands to Minecraft, making multiplayer gameplay smoother and more dynamic. With just a few simple commands, players can easily send, accept, or deny teleportation requests – perfect for survival servers, cooperative exploration, or any community that values fast and easy travel between players. > 🔁 Fully supports both **English** and **Polish** language settings automatically based on the player's client. *** ## ✨ Features * Send teleportation requests to other players * Invite players to teleport to you with `/tpahere` * Accept or deny requests with one command * Auto-accept when only one request is pending * Cancel active countdowns **or** sent requests * Block all TPA requests with `/tpatoggle` * Ignore specific players with `/tpaignore` * Requests expire automatically — both players are notified * Action bar countdown with sound effects * Cooldown between requests to prevent spam * Configurable via `config/simpletpa.json` * Auto language detection (English & Polish) * Lightweight and easy to use *** ## 💬 Commands Overview | Command |Description | | ------------------- |----------------------------------------------------------- | | /tpa <player> |Sends a teleport request to another player | | /tpahere <player> |Requests a player to teleport to you | | /tpaccept |Accepts a pending request — auto-accepts if only one | | /tpaccept <player> |Accepts a specific request by player name | | /tpadeny <player> |Denies a teleport request | | /tpacancel |Cancels your active teleport countdown or your sent request | | /tpalist |Shows all pending teleport requests | | /tpatoggle |Toggles TPA requests on/off for yourself | | /tpaignore <player> |Blocks or unblocks TPA requests from a specific player | *** ## 📬 Contact Have a suggestion, bug report, or just want to say hi? 📧 **Email:** [krysztokdev@gmail.com](mailto:krysztokdev@gmail.com)
